afterSnapshot.name: testBestWindowOutOfRange

context.userMessage: Approved — go ahead and build it. Run the tests and type checks to verify nothing is broken, and show me what changed.

rationale: Verify out-of-range coordinates are rejected by the shared coordinate validator.
implementation: Sends numeric-but-out-of-range coords (which pass schema typing) and asserts the withValidatedCoords range-error 400 shape.
